case_title: HYUNJOO YIE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

DINGO APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT MC LARENS AND CHRISTOPHER ROACH APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. M.MANZELLA, CLERK; NOT REPORTED (D506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,195.51 FILED BY YIE, HYUNJOO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MCLARENS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2016 ORDERED DESTROYED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED DEC-10-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCLARENS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YIE, HYUNJOO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MCLARENS, INC. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT MCLAREN, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS TIME BARRED BY THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
